headlines.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq post record highs as oil prices drop
AutoZone Stock Is Plummeting Despite Strong Earnings. Here's Why.
Treasury Yields Slip as U.S.-Iran Talks Drag On
Sohu (SOHU) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
3 crypto super apps that want to replace every app in your wallet
Goldman Sachs Moves Away From Apple Card And Into Buy Range
Stock Market Today: Dow, Nasdaq, S&P 500 Score Highs As Oil Falls Below $90 (Live Coverage)
Abercrombie & Fitch Co. Q1 2026 Earnings Call Summary
Gold prices today, Thursday, May 28: U.S. strikes in Iran sending gold prices lower this morning
U.S. payrolls jump more than expected, but the report had several red flags for the economy
headlines.desc: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 55,000 in April, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

headlines.title: Nvidia's trillion-dollar run puts pressure on the bulls
headlines.desc: Nvidia's market cap is now just shy of $5.7 trillion, up from $4.7 trillion as of market close last Tuesday.

headlines.title: An AI trade involving energy and infrastructure that's doubled your money, topping Nvidia
headlines.desc: If you put the same money into a basket of companies that are building out AI infrastructure and energy sources, you’ve done much better than stocks like Nvidia.

headlines.title: Consumer sentiment hits fresh record low in May as Iran war fuels inflation worries
headlines.desc: Consumer sentiment has tumbled to a fresh record low in May as fears of higher prices grow due to the U.S.-Iran war and elevated oil prices.

headlines.title: Crypto companies are trying to leave the hype cycle for a more disciplined phase, earnings show
headlines.desc: Crypto companies spent years monetizing volatility. Now they're trying to survive without it.

headlines.title: Okta shares rise on earnings beat and AI-agent opportunity
headlines.desc: Okta’s first-qarter earnings cleared Wall Street’s expectations, and the company believes a massive market for AI-agent identity management is brewing on the horizon.

headlines.title: Dell stock soars toward another record high as the AI boom drives a big earnings beat
headlines.desc: The company’s AI-server revenue was up 757% in the first quarter, while profit beat expectations by the widest margin in at least five years.

headlines.title: I’m setting up brokerage accounts for my grandkids in my daughter’s name. Is that wise — or am I asking for trouble?
headlines.desc: “The contributions are invested in mutual funds tracking the S&P 500, small-cap stocks and international equities.”

headlines.title: US Treasury secretary confirms plans for $250 bill featuring Trump’s face
headlines.desc: Proposed $250 bill would mark the first time a living person has appeared on US currency in more than a century.

headlines.title: What’s happening on Iran war day 91 as US, Iran near 60-day deal
headlines.desc: US and Iran near a 60-day MoU aimed at reopening the Hormuz strait with talks slated on nuclear and other differences.

headlines.title: The Federal Reserve is quickly running out of reasons to cut interest rates
headlines.desc: Friday's jobs report provided evidence that the central bank's larger concern is a cost of living that is getting increasingly hard to bear.

headlines.title: The Fed will have to raise interest rates in July to appease 'bond vigilantes,' Yardeni says
headlines.desc: Sent to the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, incoming Chair Kevin Warsh instead may have to push for higher levels.

headlines.title: For better or worse, investors are living through Trump’s stock market. Here's why
headlines.desc: President Donald Trump has been considered the ultimate stock market president, overseeing an expansion to record highs as well as major declines.

headlines.title: Nvidia bulls mount uphill battle into earnings
headlines.desc: Call volume outpaced puts by more than double on Monday, though more calls were exchanged at the bid or below, meaning likely sold.

headlines.title: Bill Ackman built Microsoft stake in first quarter during sell-off, betting on AI and cloud growth
headlines.desc: Bill Ackman's Pershing Square Capital Management has built a position in Microsoft, the billionaire hedge fund manager said Friday in a post on X.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts suggest these 3 stocks for their long-term prospects
headlines.desc: Robust spending and strong demand for AI infrastructure have reinforced analysts' confidence in several stocks after earnings season.

headlines.title: Top Wall Street analysts like these dividend stocks for steady income
headlines.desc: Amid ongoing uncertainty, investors seeking consistent income can consider adding dividend stocks to their portfolios.

headlines.title: Goldman says tech stock 'up crash' is sign of even more gains to come
headlines.desc: Stocks are rallying so fast it's creating a volatility dynamic that's only been seen four times in history.

headlines.title: Gemini surges after Winklevoss Capital Fund invests $100 million in the crypto exchange
headlines.desc: The company also topped revenue expectations for the quarter and posted a narrower-than-expected loss than analysts anticipated, according to FactSet.

headlines.title: Google employee charged with $1M Polymarket insider trading bet on search term
headlines.desc: The complaint from the Southern District of New York comes just over a month after another insider trading case on Polymarket.

headlines.title: Energy inflation has been more persistent than expected, Fed's Goolsbee tells CNBC
headlines.desc: While oil prices have recently fallen on news that a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran could come, prices are still significantly higher than before the war.
